name: aima-assignment
description: Student assignment repo for AIMA (from aima-assignment-starter template)

scripts.book:build: bash -lc 'test -x .venv/bin/jupyter-book && exec .venv/bin/jupyter-book build . || exec jupyter-book build .'
scripts.jupyter:lab: bash -lc 'test -x .venv/bin/jupyter && exec .venv/bin/jupyter lab --ip=127.0.0.1 --port=8888 --ServerApp.token=aima || exec jupyter lab --ip=127.0.0.1 --port=8888 --ServerApp.token=aima'
